step1.title: 1️⃣ Register PDF Materials
step1.catalog: Download from recommended free material sites

step2.title: 2️⃣ Configure SNS Access Permissions
step2.line2: Set SNS usage time limit (5-60 minutes)
step2.line3: SNS links become active for the set duration after grading

step3.title: 3️⃣ Study with PDF
step3.line3: Write directly with finger or Apple Pencil
step3.line4: Pinch to zoom, 2-finger drag to pan

step4.title: 4️⃣ AI Grading
step4.line2: Drag to select the area to grade
step4.line4: AI automatically grades and provides feedback
step4.warning: ⚠️ AI grading is not 100% accurate. Parents must verify.

snsSettings.title: Enjoy Links Settings
snsSettings.description: Select which links to show and set time limit

gradingHistory.title: Learning Timeline
gradingHistory.searchPlaceholder: Search by workbook, problem number, SNS name...

storage.title: Storage Information
storage.protectedMessage: Your data is protected from automatic deletion.
storage.notProtectedMessageIOS: Add this app to your home screen to protect your data from automatic deletion after 7 days of inactivity.
storage.notProtectedMessageOther: Install this app or use it regularly to protect your data.
storage.deleteConfirm: Delete all data (PDFs, grading history, SNS links)? This action cannot be undone.

drillCatalog.title: 📚 Recommended Free Worksheets
drillCatalog.description: Download PDFs from the sites below and add them using the '+ Add PDF' button on the home screen.
drillCatalog.tipsContent:
K5 Learning offers comprehensive worksheets organized by grade and topic.
Download the PDF and print it out for a great workbook experience!
drillCatalog.disclaimer:
※ Please use materials from each site in accordance with their respective terms of use.
HomeTeacher only provides links and is not the distributor.

imageImport.title: Image Import (Digital Binder)
imageImport.dropZone: Drop images here, or click to select
imageImport.dragToReorder: Drag and drop to reorder pages

parentSettings.title: Parent Settings
parentSettings.loginPrompt: Sign in with your Google account
parentSettings.snsTimeDesc: Free plan is fixed at 60 min. With Premium, set it freely from 1–120 min.
parentSettings.premiumActiveDesc: Thank you! All Premium features are available.
parentSettings.snsHint: Adjust the time limit from the slider in the Admin panel.
